message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

participant "Requester" as Requester
participant "PageLocsMgr" as PageLocsMgr
entity "MgrQueue" as MgrQueue
participant "StateTask" as StateTask
entity "StateQueue" as StateQueue
entity "RetrieveQueue" as RetrieveQueue
participant "RetrieverTask" as RetrieverTask

Requester -> PageLocsMgr : Startup
Requester -> StateTask : Startup
Requester -> StateTask : start(doc, first_item, item_count)

note left of StateTask
The document retrieval
optimizes the order of
the items considering
how the user interacts.
end note

StateTask -> RetrieverTask : start_document(...)

loop [All Items]
    StateTask -> RetrieveQueue : retrieve(item)
    RetrieveQueue -> RetrieverTask : retrieve(item)
    RetrieverTask -> RetrieverTask : do item
    RetrieverTask -> StateQueue : item_retrieved(item)
    StateQueue -> StateTask : item_retrieved(item)
end

== Item already known ==

Requester -> PageLocsMgr : get_page_loc(item, offset)
PageLocsMgr -> Requester : got_it(start_offset, size)

== Item needs to be retrieved (no yet in the list) ==

Requester -> PageLocsMgr : get_page_loc(item, offset)
PageLocsMgr -> StateTask : retrieve_asap(item)
StateTask -> RetrieveQueue : retrieve_asap(item)
RetrieveQueue -> RetrieverTask : retrieve(item)
RetrieverTask -> RetrieverTask : retrieve(item)
RetrieverTask -> RetrieverTask : do item
RetrieverTask -> StateQueue : item_retrieved(item)
StateQueue -> StateTask : item_retrieved(item)
StateTask -> MgrQueue : got_asap(item)
MgrQueue -> PageLocsMgr : got_asap(item)
PageLocsMgr -> Requester : got_it(start_offset, size)

StateTask -> MgrQueue : end_document()
MgrQueue -> PageLocsMgr : end_document()

@enduml
```
